examples: Every year new strains of influenza develop.
A new influenza vaccine, administered painlessly in a nasal spray, is effective for children.
Some British doctors have pointed out that one of Britain's worst waves of influenza happened soon after the new coins came into use.
The same year Tamiflu, an influenza drug it codeveloped with marketing partner Roche, got FDA approval.
Every year influenza kills 36, 000 people in the U.S., mostly the very young, very old and very infirm.
